name: sec-company-facts
description: Normalize SEC company facts into financial metric rows by CIK, taxonomy, concept, fiscal period, filing, and value.
business_value: No-key public-company account research and market monitoring.

auth.note: No API key is required; SEC expects a descriptive user agent and fair-access behavior.

verification_result: Live smoke checked SEC companyfacts for CIK0000320193 and received public facts without an API key.
known_risks: Ticker-to-CIK lookup should be added if users prefer ticker input.
